reviews.comment:
YPF ACA excelente estación de servicio con todas Las normas de calidad que propone el automóvil club argentino, cambio de firma hace poco tiempo, algunos aspectos del minimercado bajaron la calidad.

(Translated by Google)
YPF ACA is an excellent service station that meets all the quality standards set by the Argentine Automobile Club. However, the company recently changed ownership, and some aspects of the convenience store have lowered the quality.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyN0x1aVl3EAE
